scripts.db:push: bunx wrangler --config ../../apps/api/wrangler.toml d1 migrations apply cire-db --local
scripts.db:push:remote: bunx wrangler --config ../../apps/api/wrangler.toml d1 migrations apply cire-db --remote
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf ../../apps/api/.wrangler/state/v3/d1 && bunx wrangler --config ../../apps/api/wrangler.toml d1 migrations apply cire-db --local && bunx wrangler --config ../../apps/api/wrangler.toml d1 execute cire-db --local --file=./seed/dev-seed.sql
